description_long: This is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a metallic receiver and barrel, a dark wooden or polymer pistol grip, and a folding metal stock. The rifle features a curved detachable box magazine, typical of AK-pattern rifles, and iron sights mounted along the top. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a slotted flash hider. The receiver and handguard have a matte, slightly worn finish, with visible screws and mechanical details. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of metal and wood or polymer components, and the design is utilitarian, suited for rugged urban environments.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a metallic body, folding stock, curved magazine, and iron sights. The finish is matte and slightly worn, with a mix of metal and dark wood or polymer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, front sight post, and the alignment of the stock and handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, folding stock, curved magazine, and pistol grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, rear sight, and the symmetry of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, magazine release, and the overall profile of the rifle.
